TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == baca' == śīó baca' sa, mibaca' tu dawa, zikuc, caykaw nu zuma a tuutuud. iayaw mibaca' kita paylima, ayza sa mibaca' kami saungay ku baca'-kikay. baca'en baca'en ŚéĽśīó/ bace'en ku zikuc ni Kacaw. mabaca' mabaca' ŤĘęśīó/ mabaca' ni Lala' ku tuper nu maku. mibaca' mibaca' Śú®śīó/ amana ka kasic mibaca' tu zikuc nu mita. mibaca'ay mibaca'ay Śú®śīóÁöĄ/ u mibaca'ay ku kawaw nu maku i padekuwan. pibaca'i pibacai' ŚéĽśīó/ pibaca'i tu zikuc nu misu! u sulit nu Amilika Laundry is the washing of clothing and linens. Laundry processes are often done in a room reserved for that purpose; in an individual home this is referred to as a laundry room or utility room. An apartment building or student hall of residence may have a shared laundry facility such as a tv√§ttstuga. A stand-alone business is referred to as a laundrette (laundromat). The material that is being washed, or has been laundered, is also generally referred to as laundry.
S.PHON: == ba ¶a Ē~ ° == * ba ¶a Ē~ ° sa, miba ¶a Ē~ ° tu dawa, ziku ¶, ¶ajkaw nu zuma a tuutuud. iajaw miba ¶a Ē~ ° kita pajr~…ĺima, ajza sa miba ¶a Ē~ ° kami sauŇčaj ku ba ¶a Ē~ °-kikaj. ba ¶a Ē~ °…ôn ba ¶a Ē~ °…ôn **/ ba ¶…ô Ē~ °…ôn ku ziku ¶ ni ka ¶aw. maba ¶a Ē~ ° maba ¶a Ē~ ° **/ maba ¶a Ē~ ° ni r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku tup…ôr nu maku. miba ¶a Ē~ ° miba ¶a Ē~ ° **/ amana ka kasi ¶ miba ¶a Ē~ ° tu ziku ¶ nu mita. miba ¶a Ē~ °aj miba ¶a Ē~ °aj ***/ u miba ¶a Ē~ °aj ku kawaw nu maku i pad…ôkuwan. piba ¶a Ē~ °i piba ¶ai Ē~ ° **/ piba ¶a Ē~ °i tu ziku ¶ nu misu! u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika r~…ĺaundrj is tńß…ô wasńßiŇč of ¶r~…ĺotńßiŇč and r~…ĺin…ôns. r~…ĺaundrj pro ¶…ôss…ôs ar…ô oft…ôn don…ô in a room r…ôs…ôr*…ôd for tńßat purpos…ô; in an indi*iduar~…ĺ ńßom…ô tńßis is r…ôf…ôrr…ôd to as a r~…ĺaundrj room or utir~…ĺitj room. an apartm…ônt buir~…ĺdiŇč or stud…ônt ńßar~…ĺr~…ĺ of r…ôsid…ôn ¶…ô maj ńßa*…ô a sńßar…ôd r~…ĺaundrj fa ¶ir~…ĺitj su ¶ńß as a t**ttstuga. a stand-ar~…ĺon…ô busin…ôss is r…ôf…ôrr…ôd to as a r~…ĺaundr…ôtt…ô (r~…ĺaundromat). tńß…ô mat…ôriar~…ĺ tńßat is b…ôiŇč wasńß…ôd, or ńßas b…ô…ôn r~…ĺaund…ôr…ôd, is ar~…ĺso g…ôn…ôrar~…ĺr~…ĺj r…ôf…ôrr…ôd to as r~…ĺaundrj.
S.FORM: == baca' == śīó baca' sa, mibaca' tu dawa, zikuc, caykaw nu zuma a tuutuud. iayaw mibaca' kita paylima, ayza sa mibaca' kami saungay ku baca'-kikay. baca'en baca'en ŚéĽśīó/ bace'en ku zikuc ni Kacaw. mabaca' mabaca' ŤĘęśīó/ mabaca' ni Lala' ku tuper nu maku. mibaca' mibaca' Śú®śīó/ amana ka kasic mibaca' tu zikuc nu mita. mibaca'ay mibaca'ay Śú®śīóÁöĄ/ u mibaca'ay ku kawaw nu maku i padekuwan. pibaca'i pibacai' ŚéĽśīó/ pibaca'i tu zikuc nu misu! u sulit nu Amilika Laundry is the washing of clothing and linens. Laundry processes are often done in a room reserved for that purpose; in an individual home this is referred to as a laundry room or utility room. An apartment building or student hall of residence may have a shared laundry facility such as a tv√§ttstuga. A stand-alone business is referred to as a laundrette (laundromat). The material that is being washed, or has been laundered, is also generally referred to as laundry.
S.PHON: == ba ¶a Ē~ ° == * ba ¶a Ē~ ° sa, miba ¶a Ē~ ° tu dawa, ziku ¶, ¶ajkaw nu zuma a tuutuud. iajaw miba ¶a Ē~ ° kita pajr~…ĺima, ajza sa miba ¶a Ē~ ° kami sauŇčaj ku ba ¶a Ē~ °-kikaj. ba ¶a Ē~ °…ôn ba ¶a Ē~ °…ôn **/ ba ¶…ô Ē~ °…ôn ku ziku ¶ ni ka ¶aw. maba ¶a Ē~ ° maba ¶a Ē~ ° **/ maba ¶a Ē~ ° ni r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku tup…ôr nu maku. miba ¶a Ē~ ° miba ¶a Ē~ ° **/ amana ka kasi ¶ miba ¶a Ē~ ° tu ziku ¶ nu mita. miba ¶a Ē~ °aj miba ¶a Ē~ °aj ***/ u miba ¶a Ē~ °aj ku kawaw nu maku i pad…ôkuwan. piba ¶a Ē~ °i piba ¶ai Ē~ ° **/ piba ¶a Ē~ °i tu ziku ¶ nu misu! u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika r~…ĺaundrj is tńß…ô wasńßiŇč of ¶r~…ĺotńßiŇč and r~…ĺin…ôns. r~…ĺaundrj pro ¶…ôss…ôs ar…ô oft…ôn don…ô in a room r…ôs…ôr*…ôd for tńßat purpos…ô; in an indi*iduar~…ĺ ńßom…ô tńßis is r…ôf…ôrr…ôd to as a r~…ĺaundrj room or utir~…ĺitj room. an apartm…ônt buir~…ĺdiŇč or stud…ônt ńßar~…ĺr~…ĺ of r…ôsid…ôn ¶…ô maj ńßa*…ô a sńßar…ôd r~…ĺaundrj fa ¶ir~…ĺitj su ¶ńß as a t**ttstuga. a stand-ar~…ĺon…ô busin…ôss is r…ôf…ôrr…ôd to as a r~…ĺaundr…ôtt…ô (r~…ĺaundromat). tńß…ô mat…ôriar~…ĺ tńßat is b…ôiŇč wasńß…ôd, or ńßas b…ô…ôn r~…ĺaund…ôr…ôd, is ar~…ĺso g…ôn…ôrar~…ĺr~…ĺj r…ôf…ôrr…ôd to as r~…ĺaundrj.
